base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of versus_screen_ce — a ui (portrait) from 1991 street fighter ii. Versus screen — dual-portrait face-off before match. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Versus screen — dual-portrait face-off before match
